text.title: GCP Terraform Templates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: migrate state to GCS backend before any further apply
switch to a tagged version reference

text.example: preconditions == false -> state_is_local == true -> provider_floating == true -> conclusion ref.
